लघु और म瀇यम उ獸म मं灴ालय क琉 अिधसूचना सं. का.आ. 1375 (अ) तारीख 27 मई, 2013 को उन बात犘 के िसवाय िज瀈ह犆 ऐसे अिध灙मण से पहले 琈कया गया है या करने का लोप 琈कया गया है, अिध灙ा瀈त करते 牣ए उ榉त अिधिनयम के 灹योजन犘 के उ瀄तर 灹देश रा榖य सद瀡य-पदेन 6. सू瀣म, लघु और म瀇यम उ獸म के 灹भारी मं灴ी, तिमलनाडु रा榖य सद瀡य-पदेन 7. सू瀣म, लघु और म瀇यम उ獸म के 灹भारी मं灴ी, महारा瀠灩 रा榖य सद瀡य-पदेन 8. सू瀣म, लघु और म瀇यम उ獸म के 灹भारी मं灴ी, ओिडसा सद瀡य 13. सिचव, भारत सरकार, सू瀣म, लघु और म瀇यम उ獸म मं灴ालय सद瀡य-पदेन 14. सिचव, भारत सरकार, िव瀄त मं灴ालय सद瀡य-पदेन 15. सिचव, भारत सरकार, औ獸ोिगक नीित एवं संवध榁न िवभाग, सद瀡य-पदेन वािण榖य एवं उ獸ोग मं灴ालय 16. सिचव, भारत सरकार, 炈म और रोजगार मं灴ालय सद瀡य-पदेन -- 1 of 4 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] 17. सिचव, भारत सरकार, खा獸 灹सं瀡करण उ獸ोग मं灴ालय सद瀡य-पदेन 18. अ瀇य楹, रा瀠灩ीय कृिष संघ (एआईएमए) सद瀡य 23. रा瀠灩ीय अ瀇य楹, एसोिसएशन ऑफ 瀡मॉल एंड मीिडयम नॉलेज सद瀡य इंड瀡灩ी (एएमएसकेआई) 24. अ瀇य楹, एमसीसी चै瀓बर ऑफ कॉमस榁 एंड इंड瀡灩ी, कोलकाता सद瀡य 25. रा瀠灩ीय महासिचव, लघु उ獸ोग भारती सद瀡य 26. रा瀠灩ीय अ瀇य楹, ऑल इंिडया कंफडेरेशन ऑफ 瀡मॉल एंड माइ灙ो सद瀡य इंड瀡灩ी एसोिसएशन 27. महािनदेशक, इंिडया एसएमई फोरम, मुंबई सद瀡य 28. अ瀇य楹, फेडरेशन ऑफ इंड瀡灩ी एंड कॉमस榁 ऑफ नाथ榁-ई瀡ट 琇रजन सद瀡य 29. अ瀇य楹, तिमलनाडु 瀡मॉल एंड टाइनी इंड瀡灩ी एसोिसएशन (टीएएनएसटीआईए) सद瀡य 30. दिलत इंिडया चै瀓बर ऑफ कॉमस榁 एंड इंड瀡灩ी (डीआईसीसीआई) सद瀡य 31. सह-अ瀇य楹, नेशनल क猁िसल फोर एसएमई, 琈द एसोिसएटेड चै瀓बस榁 ऑफ सद瀡य कॉमस榁 एंड इंड瀡灩ी ऑफ इंिडया (एसोचैम) 32. महािनदेशक, इंिडयन चै瀓बर ऑफ कॉमस榁 (आईसीसी) सद瀡य 33. कोय瀓बतूर िडि瀡灩榉ट 瀡मॉल इंड瀡灩ी एसोिसएशन (सीओडीईएसएसआईए) सद瀡य 34. अ瀇य楹, एसएमई चै瀉टर, कंफेडेरेशन ऑफ इंिडयन इंड瀡灩ी (सीआईआई) सद瀡य 35. अ瀇य楹, एसएमई चै瀉टर, फेडेरेशन ऑफ इंिडयन चै瀓बस榁 ऑफ कॉमस榁 एंड सद瀡य इंड瀡灩ी (एफआईसीसीआई) 36. अ瀇य楹, एसएमई चे瀉टर, पीएचडी चे瀓बर ऑफ कॉमस榁 एंड इंड瀡灩ी सद瀡य 37. अ瀇य楹, कना榁टक 瀡मॉल 瀡केल इंड瀡灩ीज एसोिसएशन (केएएसएसआईए) सद瀡य 38. रा瀠灩ीय अ瀇य楹, इंिडयन इंड瀡灩ीज एसोिसएशन (आईआईए) सद瀡य 39. अ瀇य楹, एसोिसएशन ऑफ वूमैन आंट灹नर ऑफ कना榁टक (एड瀑瀖यूएकेई) सद瀡य 40. सभा瀇य楹, कंशो琕टयम ऑफ वूमैन आंट灹नर ऑफ इंिडया (सीड瀑瀖यूईआई) सद瀡य 41. 炈ी टी. मुरलीधरन, अ瀇य楹, टीएमआई समूह, हैदराबाद सद瀡य (उ獸ोगपित) 42. 炈ीमती सुषमा पाल बेरिलया, को-灹मोटर एवं अ瀇य楹, एपीजे स瀄य एंड 瀡वण榁 सद瀡य समूह, गुडगांव (अथ榁शा瀡灴ी) 43. 炈ी कृ瀠ण ख瀈ना, सं瀡थापक 瀈यासी, आईवाच, मु瀓बई सद瀡य (िव榀ान और 灹ौ獸ोिगक琉) 44. भारतीय मजदूर संघ सद瀡य 45. से瀖फ ए瀓पलॉयड िवम犆स एसोिसएशन (एसईड瀑瀖यूए), अहमदाबाद सद瀡य 46. िवशेष सिचव और िवकास आयु榉त (सू瀣म, लघु और म瀇यम उ獸म) सद瀡य सिचव- पदेन [फा.सं. 1 (19)/2013-एनबीएमएसएमई] अमरे瀈灶 िस瀈हा, िवशेष सिचव और िवकास आयु榉त (एमएसएमई) 琇ट瀉प 琇ट瀉प 琇ट瀉प 琇ट瀉पण णण ण:::: मूल अिधसूचना, अिधसूचना सं榐या का.आ. 1375 (अ) तारीख 27 मई, 2013 獧ारा 灹कािशत 牣ई थी और प瀙चातवत牸 MINISTRY OF MICRO, SMALL AND MEDIUM ENTERPRISES NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 23rd January, 2015 S.O. 226 (E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 3 of the Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises Development Act, 2006 (27 of 2006) read with rule 3 of the National Board for Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises Rules, 2006 and in supersession of the notification of the Government of India, in the Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises number S.O. 1375 (E), dated the 27th May, 2013, published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii), dated the 27th May, 2013, except as respects things done or omitted to be done before such supersession, the Central Government hereby establishes the National Board for Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises for the purposes of the said Act, which shall consist of the following members, namely:— 1. Shri Kalraj Mishra, Union Minister, Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises Chairperson-ex officio 2. Shri Giriraj Singh, Minister of State, Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises Vice Chairperson- ex officio 3. Minister in-charge of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises, State of Manipur Member – ex officio 4. Minister in-charge of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises, State of Madhya Pradesh Member – ex officio 5. Minister in-charge of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises, State of Uttar Pradesh Member – ex officio 6. Minister in-charge of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises, State of Tamil Nadu Member – ex officio 7. Minister in-charge of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises, State of Maharashtra Member – ex officio 8. Minister in-charge of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises, State of Odisha Member – ex officio 9. Shri Rahul Kaswan, Member of Parliament (Lok Sabha) Member 10. Shri Nityanand Rai, Member of Parliament (Lok Sabha) Member 11. Shri B.K.Hari Prasad, Member of Parliament (Rajya Sabha) Member 12. Administrator (Lieutenant Governor) of Andaman and Nicobar Member 13. Secretary to the Government of India, Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises Member – ex officio 14. Secretary to the Government of India, Ministry of Finance Member – ex officio 15. Secretary to the Government of India, Department of Industrial Policy and Promotion, Ministry of Commerce and Industry Member – ex officio 16. Secretary to the Government of India, Ministry of Labour and Employment Member – ex officio 17. Secretary to the Government of India, Ministry of Food Processing Industries Member – ex officio 18. Chairman, National Bank for Agriculture and Rural Development Member – ex officio 19. Chairman, Small Industries Development Bank of India Member – ex officio 20. Chairman, Indian Banks' Association Member – ex officio 21. Deputy Governor, Reserve Bank of India Member – ex officio 22. National President, All India MSME Association (AIMA) Member 23. National President, Association of Small and Medium Knowledge Industries (AMSKI) Member 24. Chairman, MCC Chamber of Commerce and Industry, Kolkata Member 25. National General Secretary, Laghu Udyog Bharti Member 26. National President, All India Confederation of Small and Micro Industries Association. Member 27. Director General, India SME Forum, Mumbai Member 28. Chairman, Federation of Industries and Commerce of North East Region. Member 29. President, Tamil Nadu Small and Tiny Industries Association (TANSTIA) Member 30. Dalit India Chamber of Commerce and Industry (DICCI). Member 31. Co-Chairman, National Council for SMEs, The Associated Chambers of Commerce and Industry of India (ASSOCHAM) Member -- 3 of 4 -- 4 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] 32. Director General, Indian Chamber of Commerce (ICC) Member 33. Coimbatore District Small Industries Association (CODESSIA) Member 34. Chairman, SME Chapter, Confederation of Indian Industry (CII) Member 35. Chairman, SME Chapter, Federation of Indian Chambers of Commerce and Industry (FICCI) Member 36. Chairman, SME Chapter, PHD Chamber of Commerce and Industry Member 37. President, Karnataka Small Scale Industries Association (KASSIA) Member 38. National President, Indian Industries Association (IIA) Member 39. President, Association of Women Entrepreneurs of Karnataka (AWAKE) Member 40. Chairperson, Consortium of Women Entrepreneurs of India (CWEI) Member 41. Shri T. Murlidharan, Chairman, TMI Group, Hyderabad Member (Industrialist) 42. Mrs. Sushma Paul Berlia, Co-Promoter and President, Apeejay Stya and Svran Group, Gurgaon. Member (Economist) 43. Shri Krishan Khanna, Founder Trustee, iWatch, Mumbai Member (Science & Technology) 44. Bhartiya Majdur Sangh Member 45. Self Employed Women's Association (SEWA), Ahmedabad Member 46. Special Secretary and Development Commissioner (Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises) Member Secretary- ex officio [F. No. 1(19)/2013-NBMSME] AMARENDRA SINHA, Spl.
